<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `nise config set`

- **Usage**: `nise config set [-f --file <FILE>] [-t --type <TYPE>] <KEY> [VALUE]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/config/set.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/config/set.rs)

Set the value of a setting in a nise.toml file

## Arguments

### `<KEY>`

The path of the config to display

### `[VALUE]`

The value to set the key to (optional if provided as KEY=VALUE)

## Flags

### `-f --file <FILE>`

The path to the nise.toml file to edit

If not provided, the nearest nise.toml file will be used

### `-t --type <TYPE>`

**Choices:**

- `infer`
- `string`
- `integer`
- `float`
- `bool`
- `list`
- `set`

**Default:** `infer`

Examples:

```
$ nise config set tools.python 3.12
$ nise config set settings.always_keep_download true
$ nise config set env.TEST_ENV_VAR ABC
$ nise config set settings.disable_tools node,rust

# Type for `settings` is inferred
$ nise config set settings.jobs 4
```
